messages.content: translate this：大众点评是中国领先的本地生活信息及交易平台，也是全球最早建立的独立第三方消费点评网站。在近几年的UI发展中，轻量化与去线化逐渐成为主流，大众点评也应顺应潮流，以减轻用户在发布时的选择负担。

Dazhong Dianping is China's leading local life information and transaction platform, and also the earliest established independent third-party consumer review website in the world. In recent years, lightweight and offline have gradually become the mainstream in UI development. Dazhong Dianping should also follow the trend to reduce the burden of choice for users when publishing.
translate： 内容编辑框架升级；统一视频编辑操作模版；提炼必要功能按层级展示；轻量化设计以减轻决策负担；添加视频剪辑必要功能；编辑操作面板可视化设计；改版方向

Upgrade of content editing framework; unified video editing operation templates; presentation of essential features in hierarchical levels; lightweight design to reduce decision-making burden; addition of necessary video editing features; visual design of editing operation panels; direction of redesign.
translate：在发布内容之前，可进行图片或者视频的选择，图片可进行多图选择，视频只能单图选择，并且可以选择“显示全部”。

Before publishing content, you can select images or videos. Multiple images can be selected for images, while only single images can be selected for videos. Additionally, there is an option to choose "show all".

translate：01-图片&视频的选择-在图片上可进行多图选择，在视频的选择上，可选择是否全屏显示，且在视频的预览中会出现播放键，可直接播放。；02-图片&视频的滤镜-多图情况下和视频都可以进行滤镜的选择，在多图中，滤镜会自动选择第一幅图的虚化封面，即统一选择图片组合的滤镜。在每个图片中的左下角有一个单独调整滤镜的按钮，可对每幅图片进行单独的滤镜设置。

在视频中，滤镜会直接显示该视频的封面，且在同一页面上可进行剪辑。

01- Selection of Images & Videos: Multiple images can be selected for images, and for videos, there is an option to choose whether to display it in full screen mode. Additionally, a playback button will appear in the video preview, allowing direct playback.

02- Filters for Images & Videos: Both images (in multi-image situations) and videos can have filters applied. In the case of multiple images, the filter will automatically select the blur cover of the first image, ensuring a unified filter choice for the image set. Each image will have a separate filter adjustment button in the bottom left corner for individual filter settings.

For videos, the filter will directly display the cover of the video, and video editing can be done on the same page.
translate: 优化发布版面；01-顶部栏的功能键过多-添加方框未进行轻量化，文字部分未进行去线化-“插入”部分并未有效利用起来-“添加话题”的功能设置的占比过大，“添加商户/地点”重复建设；02-将顶部栏的功能整合如“保存”、“发布”整合到底部-整体进行简化设计，将线条省去-去掉“插入”，直接将“商户/地点”、“菜品”、“话题”button化-统一底部导航栏设计

translate：控件设定；01-好用的控件是一个APP成功的一半，将控件设置为轻盈、易用、有美感的形式非常重要，与之前的设计对比，目前的控件设计为极简风格，尽最大的可能来降低视觉的信息量。;在滤镜设定上，采用简单明了的极简风格，去繁就简以减轻用户的视觉负担。; 在滤镜的浓度选择上沿袭滤镜选择时的风格，简单易用。;风格同左图，统一设计了极简的风格，滤镜和剪辑可在一个页面中完成，省下编辑的时间。; 在封面设定上，可进行双向选择，即从视频中截取封面，或从手机相册中另选一幅。

Widget settings;
01- Well-designed widgets are half the success of an app. It is crucial to set the widgets as light, user-friendly, and aesthetically appealing. In comparison to the previous design, the current widget design follows a minimalist style, aiming to reduce the visual information as much as possible. 
On the filter setting, a simple and clear minimalist style is adopted to alleviate the visual burden on users. The intensity selection of filters follows a style that is simple and easy to use. 
The style is consistent with the image on the left, featuring a minimalist design. Filters and editing can be done on the same page, saving editing time. 
For cover settings, there is a dual selection option. Users can choose to extract a cover from the video or select another one from their phone's photo album.
